task: Write a Python function that extracts the AWS region from an S3 bucket URI (e.g., 's3://my-bucket-us-west-2/path'). The region is the last hyphen-separated component before the final path segment.
Create a JSON object representing an AWS IAM policy that allows a user to read all objects from an S3 bucket named 'my-data-bucket' and list bucket contents.
Write a regular expression that validates an AWS EC2 security group ID format (starts with 'sg-' followed by 17 hexadecimal characters or 8 hexadecimal characters).
